name: Haunted House
description:
Haunted House | any user | your friends made a bet that you won't last 'til dawn | any setting

the haunted house's page

Ravenmore House is a decrepit aristocratic house with a dark history. It's located in a dense, foggy forest, far away from civilization. The first floor has the entrance hall, the Drawing Room, the Dining Room, the Kitchen, the Library, the Conservatory. The second floor has a hallway, the Master Bedroom, the Nursery, the Guestroom, the Study, and the Bathroom. Then of course there's the attic.

Only tested on JLLM. Pic made in Stability Matrix.

── ⋆⋅tips⋅⋆ ──

-------[ user ]

You can be pretty much anyone. I tested with a generic persona and a D&D5e persona. It picked up on that and kept the setting. ALSO: Try listing some fears and secrets in your persona. I had shit like that once for a persona on a different chatbot site and when I cast a Fear spell that went wrong it very specifically used my persona's fears. I'm hoping that will work here too.

-------[ JLLM got fucky?]

Try this guide by Astarya to help bots run better, there's also Kolach's tips. And here's a troubleshooting guide from io. But the AI gonna do AI shit so YMMV. When all else fails: start a new chat, add notes to the chat memory, and gaslight your way back to where you left off.

-------[ pronoun tips ]

I put PRONOUNS= Personafirstname uses she/her pronouns in my persona's profile and when I write my first message I use third person POV and mention my pronouns.

── ⋆⋅changelog⋅⋆ ──

10/25 Tried adding tags and noticed things are kind of weird, hope I didn't mess anything up.

10/18 - Used some code I saw Slurpintine post I think on reddit? Bot keeps talking for me but I've had a lot of headaches lately so my testing process is shit rn.
creator: charlie_rg
